queryExamples: How much are we spending monthly?
Which vendors put us over budget?
What can we cut to get under budget?
notes: Confirmed from Gmail receipts and the subscription audit tracker; unresolved usage-based tools still require dashboard verification.
Recent quick enrollments/cancellations may make next-month realized spend lower than this snapshot.

transitionAdjustments.rationale: Claude Max appears in the current receipt-backed run-rate, but the ChatGPT switch should remove this line from the next settled cycle if cancellation remains in place.

apifyCallAnalysis.lastMonitorExecution: Direct provider refresh on 2026-06-03 was readable; sampled account-level Apify runs included same-day successful runs on 2026-06-03 and 2026-06-02. Actor-level bakeoff evidence remains the active replacement-analysis base.
apifyCallAnalysis.nextAction: Keep productive evidence actors under watch, pause or replace no-run/failing/empty-output actors, and compare the remaining productive categories against cheaper alternatives before renewal.

googlePlacesPromotionGate.localKeyStatus: API-restricted to Places API (New); acceptable for the short local/Codex bakeoff window.
googlePlacesPromotionGate.productionRequirement: Do not promote Google Places as the durable Apify Google Maps replacement until the production runner and outbound egress path are confirmed.
requiredControls: Separate production key from the local bakeoff key.
IP address restriction if the production runner has stable outbound egress.
Strict quota limits, billing alerts, and a rotation review date if stable egress is not available yet.
Infisical/Vercel runtime sink sync only after the production key is approved.
Production-like rerun of npm run apify:replacement-bakeoff -- --run before replacing the Apify Google Maps actor.

productionRunnerDecision.egressPosture: Static outbound egress is not confirmed for the current n8n runner.
productionRunnerDecision.ctORecommendation: Keep application restrictions API-only until the runner has stable outbound egress.
productionRunnerDecision.validationGate: Run the live bakeoff from the production-like runner before replacing the Apify Google Maps actor.

actorRunHistory.label: Facebook friends
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Pause unless a campaign-owned Facebook source is explicitly active; browser/manual review is safer before re-enabling.

actorRunHistory.label: Facebook groups
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Pause by default and replace with manual group review or approved community exports if needed.

actorRunHistory.label: Facebook comments
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Pause unless a specific post-engagement campaign justifies a controlled run.

actorRunHistory.label: LinkedIn connections
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Replace or keep disabled; repeated failures with zero output make this a poor use of Apify.

actorRunHistory.label: LinkedIn post engagement
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Investigate input quality before keeping; success with zero items is not useful output.

actorRunHistory.label: Reddit listening
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Keep for now; run a bakeoff against Reddit API/RSS/search before replacing.

actorRunHistory.label: Google Maps
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Keep only if Google Places API or manual CSV cannot produce equivalent accepted evidence.

actorRunHistory.label: LinkedIn post search
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Keep as the strongest current Apify value signal; compare against browser-agent sampling.

actorRunHistory.label: G2 reviews
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Replace with manual/source-registered review capture unless the actor can return non-empty datasets.

actorRunHistory.label: Capterra reviews
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Keep only for targeted evidence collection; run a manual/browser-search replacement test.

actorRunHistory.label: Profile enrichment
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Remove from active watch if the older HeyGen cold-email flow is retired.

actorRunHistory.label: Website screenshot/video
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Replace with local Playwright/Browser Use/Vercel Chromium capture if website capture is still needed.

summary.headline: Daily refresh: Supabase, n8n, Vercel, Apify, OpenAI, Anthropic, Slack, Pinecone, Hunter, Printful, HeyGen voices, and Read AI remain readable or active; Gamma auth regressed; OpenRouter and Vapi stayed quiet; no vendor reached the approval-ready cancellation threshold.
nextReviewFocus: Restore or rotate Gamma API access and verify dashboard credits before renewal.
Review ElevenLabs current-cycle zero usage against the next planned campaign before the 2026-06-19 reset.
Confirm OpenRouter role in the next media/model bakeoff before preparing any deprecation packet.
Verify Vapi dashboard billing and whether production voice UX should stay enabled.
Check Printful dashboard order history and decide whether the 2026-04-06 API-visible draft order plus quiet sync log justifies keeping native store paths.
Verify whether production uses Resend or Gmail/n8n as the real outbound channel.
Check Pinecone billing/API traffic against Supabase/local RAG usage.
Restore or replace Calendly API access and rerun event-type usage checks.
Resolve Gemini/Google AI project/key status before relying on image/social workflows.
Check HeyGen dashboard quota/billing because voice catalog access does not prove active paid usage.
Verify Read AI recency because the connector was readable but returned no June 1-3 meetings.
Verify Anthropic billing and Claude/API transition state now that API model listing remains readable.
Continue the Apify actor-level replacement bakeoff by pausing weak surfaces before account-level changes.
Keep BuiltWith active during the outreach ramp and judge it only against lead-prep and conversion evidence.
For Fireflies, verify billing only if dashboard or receipt evidence suggests the canceled plan was restarted.

needsDecision: Fireflies paid-plan verification only if new billing evidence appears

vendors.name: Vapi
vendors.billingSignal: Dashboard billing still needs verification; VAPI_PRIVATE_KEY was present and the 2026-06-03 default call sample returned HTTP 200 with zero calls again.
vendors.usageSignal: No meaningful current Vapi usage appeared again; local references remain, including optional website voice paths.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Voice/audit experience risk if production voice UX is enabled.
vendors.recommendation: Investigate billing and intended voice UX; prepare a deprecation packet only if dashboard spend exists and voice UX is not needed.
vendors.nextAction: Check Vapi dashboard billing and decide whether the voice path should stay enabled.

vendors.name: BuiltWith
vendors.billingSignal: Receipt-backed spend remains the largest watch item, but Vambah confirmed BuiltWith should stay active during the outreach/client-volume ramp.
vendors.usageSignal: Portfolio still stores website tech-stack enrichment fields in outreach/admin flows; usefulness depends on lead-prep, implementation-strategy, proposal, and conversion evidence.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Outreach and client-preparation enrichment may depend on stack data during ramp.
vendors.recommendation: Keep active during outreach ramp; reassess only after enough sales evidence exists.
vendors.nextAction: Keep collecting sales-prep and proposal-quality evidence before judging BuiltWith.

vendors.name: Fireflies.ai
vendors.billingSignal: No new paid-plan evidence found on 2026-06-03; standing decision remains canceled per Vambah confirmation on 2026-05-01.
vendors.usageSignal: Any old transcript/Slack residue is historical only unless new billing or dashboard evidence appears.
vendors.recommendation: Keep out of active cancellation queue unless new billing or dashboard evidence shows the paid plan restarted.
vendors.nextAction: Do not reopen Fireflies unless new paid-plan evidence appears.

vendors.name: Vercel
vendors.billingSignal: Vercel CLI remained authenticated as vsillah on 2026-06-03; subscription cost remains receipt-backed from prior budget snapshot.
vendors.usageSignal: CLI JSON listings returned READY same-day deployments for both portfolio and portfolio-staging on 2026-06-03.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Core hosting, previews, production, and staging verification.
vendors.recommendation: Keep; hosting is active and high-risk to change.
vendors.nextAction: Keep hosting; continue deployment health checks through the normal Portfolio release workflow.

vendors.name: Printful
vendors.billingSignal: Printful API remained readable on 2026-06-03 and returned one sampled draft order from 2026-04-06; dashboard billing/store status still needs verification.
vendors.usageSignal: Both sampled Supabase printful_sync_log tables remain empty; native store code references remain.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Merchandise/order fulfillment if the store strategy is active.
vendors.recommendation: Investigate dashboard order history and merchandise strategy before any deprecation decision.
vendors.nextAction: Check Printful dashboard order/store status and decide whether merchandise paths should remain first-class.

vendors.name: Resend
vendors.billingSignal: RESEND_API_KEY remained absent locally on 2026-06-03; package/env/webhook references remain.
vendors.usageSignal: Production usage remains unresolved because local absence does not prove Vercel/runtime absence.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Transactional email deliverability if Resend is enabled in production.
vendors.recommendation: Verify production env and billing before removing Resend paths.
vendors.nextAction: Check Vercel production env and Resend dashboard billing/usage.

vendors.name: Pinecone
vendors.billingSignal: Pinecone API was readable on 2026-06-03 and listed one ready serverless publications index in aws/us-east-1.
vendors.usageSignal: Index existence is confirmed; query traffic and billing remain unresolved.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Publication/RAG search path if Pinecone remains the live vector store.
vendors.recommendation: Investigate billing/API traffic before any replacement with Supabase or local RAG.
vendors.nextAction: Compare Pinecone dashboard traffic with Supabase/local RAG usage.

vendors.name: Apify
vendors.billingSignal: Apify API was readable on 2026-06-03 and latest sampled actor runs included same-day successful runs with small sampled usage costs.
vendors.usageSignal: Account-level activity is fresh; actor-level replacement work should target weak/no-output surfaces instead of account cancellation.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Lead, social listening, and evidence scraping workflows remain wired through n8n and repo scripts.
vendors.recommendation: Keep the account active; continue the actor-level bakeoff and pause or replace weak actor surfaces.
vendors.nextAction: Use the bakeoff to decide actor-by-actor replacements before any account-level change.

vendors.name: Hunter.io
vendors.billingSignal: Hunter API remained readable on 2026-06-02 and reported Free plan with 50 used calls and 75 available.
vendors.usageSignal: Lead enrichment references remain; no paid-plan cancellation target was found.
vendors.recommendation: Keep/watch; not a paid cancellation target unless paid-plan evidence appears.
vendors.nextAction: Keep as free/watch; revisit only if paid receipts or active replacement work appear.

vendors.name: OpenRouter
vendors.billingSignal: OpenRouter key was readable on 2026-06-03 and still reports usage 0.
vendors.usageSignal: No meaningful current OpenRouter usage appeared again; model-routing references remain optional/bakeoff-oriented.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Potential model-router or bakeoff fallback; no current usage signal from the sampled key.
vendors.recommendation: Watch; prepare deprecation only after spend, dependency, and bakeoff role are confirmed.
vendors.nextAction: Confirm whether OpenRouter has a remaining role in media/model bakeoffs.

vendors.name: ElevenLabs
vendors.billingSignal: Creator subscription remained readable on 2026-06-03 with 0 of 246,034 characters used before the 2026-06-19 reset.
vendors.usageSignal: Current reset cycle remains quiet while audio/social workflow references remain.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Voiceover/audio generation for social content and media campaigns.
vendors.recommendation: Watch through the next campaign decision; cancellation needs dashboard spend and replacement-path confirmation.
vendors.nextAction: Compare upcoming audio needs against renewal timing before the 2026-06-19 reset.

vendors.name: Read.ai
vendors.billingSignal: Read AI remains receipt-backed and connector-readable; the connector returned six meetings in the 2026-05-01 through 2026-06-03 window.
vendors.usageSignal: Latest returned meeting was 2026-05-29 and no June 1-3 meetings were returned in this run; keep but verify recency before renewal.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Meeting intelligence and transcript workflows remain useful for client/project work when meetings are active.
vendors.recommendation: Keep/watch; verify dashboard recency and whether upcoming meeting workflows still need Read AI.
vendors.nextAction: Check Read AI dashboard recency and keep only if meeting-capture workflow remains active.

vendors.name: Calendly
vendors.billingSignal: Calendly API still returned 401 on 2026-06-03; receipt-backed Standard plan remains in the budget snapshot.
vendors.usageSignal: Scheduling links, tests, and n8n booking workflows remain configured, but API usage could not be verified.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Discovery, onboarding, kickoff, progress, renewal, and delivery scheduling links.
vendors.recommendation: Refresh token or verify dashboard usage; keep until scheduling replacement is decided.
vendors.nextAction: Restore Calendly API access and rerun event-type usage checks.

vendors.name: Gemini / Google AI
vendors.billingSignal: Gemini/Google AI model-list check still returned 403 on 2026-06-03; Google Cloud spend remains low and separate in the budget snapshot.
vendors.usageSignal: Image/social workflow references remain, but project/key readiness is unresolved.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Gemini/image generation and RAG chatbot experiments if still active.
vendors.recommendation: Resolve key/project status before relying on or deprecating Gemini workflows.
vendors.nextAction: Check Google AI Studio/Cloud project permissions and billing association.

vendors.name: Anthropic
vendors.billingSignal: Anthropic API model listing remained readable on 2026-06-03 with 10 models; Claude Max billing transition still needs receipt/dashboard confirmation.
vendors.usageSignal: Anthropic remains wired into model dispatch and n8n/model workflows.
vendors.portfolioDependency: LLM fallback/evaluation paths and any Claude Max workflow still in use.
vendors.recommendation: Watch billing transition; keep API path until replacement and spend are confirmed.
vendors.nextAction: Verify whether Claude Max subscription spend actually drops next cycle and whether API spend is separate.

vendors.name: Figma / Paper / Excalidraw / Canva
vendors.billingSignal: No fresh billing evidence was found on 2026-05-31; repo/workflow-adjacent references remain only.
vendors.usageSignal: Design and diagram assets exist locally, but no current paid dashboard signal was gathered in this run.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Design artifacts, diagrams, and visual content workflows if active outside repo code.
vendors.recommendation: Investigate only if receipts, dashboard evidence, or active design-production needs appear.
vendors.nextAction: Investigate only if receipts, dashboard evidence, or active design-production needs appear.

vendors.name: Gamma
vendors.billingSignal: Gamma Pro remains receipt-backed, but the 2026-06-03 API check returned HTTP 401 invalid/expired token after prior readable checks.
vendors.usageSignal: DB report rows remain quiet since 2026-05-02; report/deck code paths remain wired.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Deck/report generation workflows may still depend on Gamma while Codex/PPTX alternatives are compared.
vendors.recommendation: Investigate key, dashboard billing, and credit usage before renewal; do not cancel from API auth failure alone.
vendors.nextAction: Restore/rotate Gamma API access and verify dashboard credits plus recent report usage.

vendors.name: HeyGen
vendors.billingSignal: HeyGen receipt remains active from prior budget snapshot; voice catalog was readable on 2026-06-03 with 2348 voices.
vendors.usageSignal: Voice catalog access proves API readability, while campaign usage and avatar quota still need dashboard verification.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Avatar video generation and media campaign workflows.
vendors.recommendation: Keep/watch; verify quota and active video campaign need before renewal.
vendors.nextAction: Check HeyGen dashboard quota/billing and retry avatar/template evidence.
